description: Occupation summaries, required skills, typical tasks, and education requirements sourced from O*NET OnLine (O*NET 29.0 database). Used as the international-tier baseline for career pathways relevant to computing graduates. O*NET data is produced by the US Department of Labor and is freely available in the public domain.

source.provider: O*NET Resource Center, US Department of Labor / Employment and Training Administration
source.license: Public domain (US federal government work) — no redistribution restrictions
source.soc_description: Software developers, QA engineers, data scientists, network architects, cybersecurity analysts, ML engineers, and business intelligence analysts

schema.text: string — occupation title, summary, tasks, and skills concatenated

known_limitations: US labour market context; salary and demand figures may not reflect Nepal directly
Used as international benchmark only; Nepal-tier citations are weighted higher in prompts
bias_notes: US-centric occupation definitions and salary norms
May overstate formal-degree requirements relative to Nepal industry practice
